steps.title: Identify the logical relationship between the sentences
steps.content: The first sentence says the probe shortened Dimorphos’s orbital period by 32 minutes. The sentence after the blank gives the specific times: 11 hours 55 minutes before, 11 hours 23 minutes after. That is a difference of 32 minutes — the same fact restated with precise numbers. The transition must signal “in other words” or “to be specific.”

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices and confirm the answer
steps.content:
• "That is,": means “in other words” — correctly signals that the following sentence restates the 32-minute shortening with exact before-and-after figures. ✓
  • "Furthermore,": signals that additional, new information follows — but the times are not new; they simply specify the already-stated 32-minute change. ✗
  • "Meanwhile,": signals simultaneous parallel action — there is no second concurrent event described in the passage. ✗
  • "For example,": signals one instance of a broader pattern — the specific times are not an example of the shortening; they are the shortening restated precisely. ✗
That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
